section.heading: Noncompliance with this subchapter

subsection.heading: Consumer waivers invalid
subsection.chapeau: Any waiver by any consumer of any protection provided by or any right of the consumer under this subchapter—

paragraph.content: shall be treated as void; and
may not be enforced by any Federal or State court or any other person.

content.p: Any attempt by any person to obtain a waiver from any consumer of any protection provided by or any right of the consumer under this subchapter shall be treated as a violation of this subchapter.

subsection.heading: Contracts not in compliance
subsection.chapeau: Any contract for services which does not comply with the applicable provisions of this subchapter—

paragraph.content: shall be treated as void; and
may not be enforced by any Federal or State court or any other person.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 90–321, title IV, § 408, as added Pub. L. 104–208, div. A, title II, § 2451, Sept. 30, 1996, 110 Stat. 3009–459.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section applicable after the end of the 6-month period beginning on Sept. 30, 1996, except with respect to contracts entered into by a credit repair organization before the end of such period, see section 413 of Pub. L. 90–321, as added by Pub. L. 104–208, set out as a note under section 1679 of this title.
